summary: The diff adds the new hook `use1v1Lol3DGame.ts` and modifies `OneLolGame.tsx` to implement the 3D 1v1 battle game. Core structures for all six requirements are present (weapon definitions, difficulty configs, arena scene, HUD elements, game-over screen, ScoreSubmission/Leaderboard imports). However, both files are truncated, making it impossible to fully verify several acceptance criteria — particularly around the complete game loop, AI weapon switching, pointer-lock controls integration, reload progress bar, and Leaderboard rendering. Based on visible evidence, the implementation appears largely complete but a few specific ACs cannot be confirmed.

missing_requirements.requirement: All state updates occur inside a requestAnimationFrame game loop
missing_requirements.reason: The hook sets up a rafRef and lastTimeRef suggesting a rAF loop, but the actual loop body and state update logic is truncated. Cannot confirm the loop is fully implemented with collision detection and projectile physics.

missing_requirements.requirement: Player can move with WASD and look with mouse (pointer lock)
missing_requirements.reason: PointerLockControls is imported from @react-three/drei and keysRef is set up in the hook, but the actual pointer-lock integration and WASD movement handler inside the Canvas/scene is truncated and cannot be confirmed as fully wired up.

missing_requirements.requirement: AI reloads weapons when empty just like the player
missing_requirements.reason: The hook defines aiReloadTimerRef suggesting reload logic exists, but the actual AI reload implementation is in the truncated portion of the hook and cannot be confirmed.

hallucinated_features.description: Neon edge strip decorations on arena walls (cyan and red glowing strips at ground level)
hallucinated_features.reason: The spec only asks for ground, perimeter walls, and cover obstacles. The neon edge strips are purely cosmetic additions not requested in the spec.

hallucinated_features.description: Grid helper overlay on arena ground
hallucinated_features.reason: The spec does not request a grid helper on the ground plane; this is an extra visual element added beyond what was specified.
